title: buildah: correctly create the userns if euid!=0
body:
we were skipping the creation of the creation of a namespace if the
euid != 0.

regression introduced by 3d7403130100c3558ea14a1c21482559109de043

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

please wait to merge, there are other fixes needed

it is ready to merge now
